name: Summer Squash with Low Fat Cottage Cheese
recipeIngredient: 6 to 8 summer squash (zucchini, crookneck, patty pan, or any assortment) - 1½ to 2 pounds
1 green or red bell pepper (or half each)
2 leaves fresh basil (or a pinch of dried basil)
¼ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
4 ounces low-fat cottage cheese and/or 4 ounces low-fat or imitation cream cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare vegetables: Slice the summer squash in a food processor, or cut into chunks.
2. Chop onion, garlic, and basil in a food processor, or chop by hand. Dice celery and bell pepper.
3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Sauté the prepared ingredients (onion, garlic, celery, bell pepper) with black pepper until fragrant, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
4. Reduce heat and let the mixture simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add cottage cheese or cream cheese, stir well, and transfer to a serving dish.
